critique: The delivered result proves a nontrivial calibrated lower-bound exponent r_*(alpha,gamma) for the weak-overlap margin class and a matching-polynomial clipped-AIPW upper bound only on law collections where the foldwise nuisance-rate condition is supplied. It does not prove a no-log exact minimax value, and it does not prove achievability over the full class P_{alpha,gamma} from overlap decay alone. The upper theorem is therefore conditional on high-level learner performance, while the lower theorem depends on a primitive local-richness witness for the policy class. This is still a real rate contribution at field level, but the headline must be read as a polynomial bracket with a conditional feasible upper, not a sharp full-class minimax characterization.
